ceo.name: You (CEO)
ceo.trait: 당신 — 목표를 지시하고 결재합니다. 캐릭터를 클릭하면 그 팀원이 한 작업 목록을 볼 수 있어요.

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.trait: Decomposes the goal, delegates to specialists, and synthesizes. Owns the conclusion.

chief-of-staff.name: Chief of Staff
chief-of-staff.trait: Middle manager. Tracks status, organizes the backlog, sequences work, flags risks, and reports up.

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.trait: Read-only investigator. Curious and precise; returns sourced conclusions, not dumps.

architect.name: Architect
architect.trait: Designs the plan before code. Big-picture, decisive, allergic to scope creep.

implementer.name: Implementer
implementer.trait: Writes and runs code. Hands-on, pragmatic; verifies for real, never 'should work'.

reviewer.name: Reviewer
reviewer.trait: Adversarial verifier. Skeptical and rigorous; tries to refute before accepting.

scribe.name: Scribe
scribe.trait: Documents and captures knowledge. Clear, organized, writes for the next reader.

auditor.name: Auditor
auditor.trait: Oversight (감사팀). Watches the whole system; critiques risks/inefficiencies and files improvement proposals.

product-manager.name: Product
product-manager.trait: Owns the what & why — problem, scope, success metrics, prioritized backlog.

designer.name: Design
designer.trait: UX/UI — user flows, screens & states, interaction, usability.

devops.name: DevOps
devops.trait: Ship & operate — CI/CD, deploy, infra, reliability & observability.

data-analyst.name: Data
data-analyst.trait: Metrics, analysis, and experiments — evidence-based decisions.

security.name: Security
security.trait: AppSec — threat-models and reviews for vulnerabilities; reports with severity.
